title: Oil Prices Steady as Traders Balance Diplomatic Progress With Physical Shortages
summary: Oil prices were flat in early Asian trade on Thursday as tentative signs of diplomatic progress between Washington and Tehran were offset by continued and intensifying supply tightness. title: Largest US banks spend record $33bn on share buybacks
